title: Better Rails!
description: Improved and Animated Rails! From 1.16.2 to 1.21.x!
body:
# BETTER RAILS!
### A Fresh Take on Minecraft Rails!


![Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a76d5f8575ab7fe1ba905cd2452ef7d7250242e.jpeg)

I’ve always felt that rails in Minecraft deserved more love, so this pack gives them a complete makeover. They in fact now present a three-dimensional style, have spruce wood planks to act as sleeper and an iron texture for the metal part of the rail. In addition, the version of the rails that goes upward **no longer has that streaked look**, but rather to a complete renovation, with softer curves and supports to keep it from floating.

To make them feel even more alive, all rails have animated redstone effects when active. It’s a small detail, but it makes your railway systems look so much more dynamic.

![Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87b674a1af5011f806338ab05fa1fe3ccce8f095_0.webp)

I am working now to implement wood-themed variants: Dark Oak, Oak, Acacia, and even Crimson from the Nether.

This pack is all about giving rails the attention they deserve, making them fit naturally into your world and adding that extra bit of character to your builds!
